title: UniSCL: Unified subcellular localisation and feature interpretability analysis for messenger RNA and long non-coding RNA
author: LI, Jing
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The cleaned and curated dataset generated in this study has been deposited in Zenodo and is publicly available for access and reuse. It includes the processed mRNA and lncRNA sequences together with the unified subcellular localisation labels used in the downstream analyses.
steps_raw: The cleaned and curated dataset generated in this study has been deposited in Zenodo and is publicly available for access and reuse. It includes the processed mRNA and lncRNA sequences together with the unified subcellular localisation labels used in the downstream analyses.
